scenario.name: Digest registration
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:127.0.0.1:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP 127.0.0.1:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:1001@pbx.example.invalid>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:1001@pbx.example.invalid> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: <sip:1001@127.0.0.1:[local_port]>;expires=300 Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

REGISTER sip:127.0.0.1:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP 127.0.0.1:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:1001@pbx.example.invalid>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:1001@pbx.example.invalid> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 REGISTER Contact: <sip:1001@127.0.0.1:[local_port]>;expires=300 Max-Forwards: 70 [authentication username=1001 password=password-1001] Content-Length: 0
